rationale.R1.2: Agent identifies several logical inconsistencies and provides specific examples and fixes, demonstrating a strong understanding of the argument chain but doesn't flag every inconsistency.
rationale.R1.3: Audits load-bearing claims thoroughly, pointing out unsupported claims with suggestions for improvement.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainties effectively, especially regarding generalization, but could improve by explicitly marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Generally within scope with minor drifts in discussing causal mechanisms.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harms and suggests caveats to prevent misuse, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not all edits, showing room for improvement in traceability.
